$comment: iBeetKidz v2 — warm retro-console palette (Mario Paint era). Flat, saturated but NOT neon. One shared set; nothing off-palette. Maps to the app CSS vars.

backdrop.$note: friendly daylight-to-dusk, not near-black; light panels must pop on it

rules.fills: flat only on UI; sprite shading = 1-2 darker steps of the same hue or dithering
rules.outline: 1px (base res) deep plum #2b2440, consistent on every sprite
rules.perIconColors: <=5 from primaries + ink outline + one highlight

visualizer.$comment: JS-controlled in retro-scope.ts; keep it calm + recessed
